_comment: Hidden per-TILE XP multiplier — the game-tuning curve. HAND-AUTHORED: this
file is the single source of truth for the XP curve and is NOT generated.
The mod multiplies earned monster XP by tileXpMultiplier[<tile letter>] (on
top of the per-difficulty base in patch/DifficultyXpScaler.as), so the
player's real in-game progression follows this curve.
The apworld's gate generator reads this SAME file:
rescaled so a full clear == target WL). The apworld runtime never sees the
multiplier — only the finished eff_xp/gate numbers.
=> After changing any value here you MUST re-run apply_xp_curve.py --apply
and rebuild both the apworld and the mod, or the game's XP curve will
desync from the logic's WL gates.
Shape: steep rise early (fast opening progression), flattening to a plateau
late (endgame gets scarce). Tiles are listed in game progression order.
